aids.title: Deployment Strategies by Risk
aids.content:
Risk Order (Lowest to Highest):
Canary → Blue-Green → Rolling → Recreate

Canary: Test with 5%
Blue-Green: Instant switch
Rolling: Gradual replace
Recreate: Full restart

aids.title: CI/CD Pipeline Stages
aids.content:
CI = Continuous Integration
- Build → Test → Merge

CD = Continuous Deployment
- Release → Deploy → Monitor
